response.justification: Aisha demonstrates extensive full-stack development experience with a strong focus on TypeScript, Node.js, and React—directly aligning with the role's primary stack. Her background includes building scalable systems, AI-agent infrastructure, and developer tooling, alongside measurable impact in high-throughput environments. The breadth of her experience and leadership in technical initiatives makes her a strong fit for this senior role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proven track record in scalable systems and AI-agent development
Strong ownership and leadership in technical projects and open-source contributions
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js (though likely transferable from Node.js)
Some experience in unrelated domains (e.g., embedded systems)
German language skills are basic, though English is fluent
